data.title: Integrated Media Technology Appoints Zhiyun Tan as Company Secretary After Edwards’ Exit
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Integrated Media Technology ( (IMTE) ) has issued an announcement.

Integrated Media Technology Limited has announced changes to its corporate governance structure, centered on the role of Company Secretary. The Australia‑based technology and media company continues to rely on seasoned financial and advisory expertise within its board to support its compliance and reporting obligations as a foreign private issuer in the U.S. market.

On July 1, 2026, the board terminated the contract of Company Secretary Julie Ann Edwards, stating the decision did not stem from any disagreement over the company’s operations, policies or practices. Effective the same day, non‑executive director and Sydney‑based business consultant Zhiyun Tan, a CPA and Chartered Tax Adviser with more than a decade of corporate advisory experience, was appointed Company Secretary, signaling continuity and potential strengthening of the firm’s administrative and regulatory capabilities.

More about Integrated Media Technology

Integrated Media Technology Limited is a foreign private issuer listed in the United States and headquartered in Adelaide, Australia. The company operates in the technology and media sector, with governance overseen by a board that includes non‑executive directors and relies on experienced finance and advisory professionals to support its corporate administration and regulatory compliance.

The firm’s leadership structure emphasizes strong financial oversight, with roles such as Company Secretary central to managing its reporting obligations and interface with regulators. Board appointments and changes in key officer positions are formally disclosed to investors through U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission filings, underscoring the company’s focus on corporate governance and transparency.

Average Trading Volume: 67,564

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.58M

Find detailed analytics on IMTE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Eltek Calls August 11 Annual Meeting to Vote on Board, Director Protections and Auditor
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Eltek ( (ELTK) ) has shared an announcement.

Eltek Ltd., an Israel-based foreign private issuer with ordinary shares listed abroad, is subject to both U.S. reporting requirements and Israeli corporate law. The company’s governance framework includes specific quorum rules, classifications of controlling shareholders and personal interests, and the use of external directors and compensation committee approvals to oversee board-level protections and audit arrangements.

On July 2, 2026, Eltek filed a report announcing its annual general meeting of shareholders to be held on August 11, 2026, in Petach Tikva, Israel. Shareholders will vote on re-electing four directors, appointing an external director, extending exculpation and indemnification letters for director Revital Cohen-Tzemach, re-appointing Ernst & Young affiliate Kost Forer Gabbay & Kasierer as independent auditor for 2026, and reviewing the 2025 audited financial statements, underscoring a focus on board continuity, director protections and stable audit oversight.

Spark’s Take on ELTK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELTK is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by deteriorating financial performance—losses and very weak cash generation with deeply negative free cash flow—alongside bearish technical momentum (below key moving averages and negative MACD). These are partially offset by a low-leverage balance sheet and earnings-call indicators of potential recovery (backlog growth, capacity expansion progress, and reiterated longer-term margin/revenue targets), while valuation support is limited due to a negative P/E despite a moderate dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ELTK stock,
click here.

More about Eltek

Eltek Ltd. is an Israel-based company listed in the United States as a foreign private issuer. The company’s ordinary shares, with a nominal value of NIS 3.00 per share, trade on a foreign exchange and are governed by Israeli corporate and securities regulations. Eltek operates under an amended and restated articles of association that set detailed rules for shareholder voting and quorum requirements.

As part of its ongoing corporate governance cycle, Eltek has called an annual general meeting of shareholders for August 11, 2026, in Petach Tikva, Israel. On the agenda are the re-election of four directors, the election of an external director, extensions of exculpation and indemnification arrangements for one director, re-appointment of its independent auditor for 2026, and a review of audited 2025 financial statements, signaling routine board refreshment and continued adherence to Israeli governance standards.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Trinity Biotech Clinical Data Validates CGM+ Advantage in Tackling False Low Glucose Alerts
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Trinity Biotech ( (TRIB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 2, 2026, Trinity Biotech reported clinical trial results from a pre-pivotal study of its next-generation CGM+ wearable biosensor platform in insulin-dependent people with diabetes. Analysis of about 5,000 hours of wear time showed CGM+ can algorithmically distinguish nocturnal compression-related false low glucose readings from true blood glucose lows by combining glucose data with additional physiological signals.

The company argues that this multi-sensor capability addresses a major limitation of conventional glucose-only CGM systems, which can generate sleep-disrupting false alarms and drive avoidable glucose variability, with knock-on effects for automated insulin delivery decisions. Management says the findings validate CGM+’s platform strategy, strengthen its differentiation in the roughly $15 billion global CGM market, and will be incorporated as the product advances toward pivotal trials and regulatory submission.

Spark’s Take on TRIB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TRIB is a Neutral.

TRIB scores low primarily due to very weak financial performance (multi-year losses, negative equity, rising debt, and ongoing cash burn). Technicals further pressure the score as the stock trades well below major moving averages with negative momentum indicators. Valuation is also constrained because the company is unprofitable (negative P/E) and there is no dividend yield data to offset risk.

To see Spark’s full report on TRIB stock,
click here.

More about Trinity Biotech

Trinity Biotech plc is a commercial-stage biotechnology company focused on human diagnostics and diabetes management solutions, including wearable biosensors. It develops, acquires, manufactures, and markets diagnostic systems for point-of-care and clinical laboratory segments, and has expanded into CGM and advanced liquid cooling for AI data centers through acquisitions and its Trinovium subsidiary.

The company sells directly in the U.S. and via international distributors and strategic partners in over 75 countries worldwide. Its CGM+ platform targets the global continuous glucose monitoring market, seeking differentiation with multi-sensor, AI-driven analytics that add physiological context to traditional glucose data.

Average Trading Volume: 1,284,055

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.9M

Learn more about TRIB stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Integrated Media Technology Wins Nasdaq Extension to Meet Minimum Bid Price Rule
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Integrated Media Technology ( (IMTE) ).

On June 30, 2026, Integrated Media Technology Limited disclosed that it had received notice from Nasdaq granting an additional 180 days, until December 29, 2026, to regain compliance with the exchange’s minimum bid price requirement. This extension followed an earlier December 30, 2025 notification that the company’s stock had traded below the $1 minimum for 30 consecutive business days through December 23, 2025.

Although Integrated Media Technology did not restore its share price to the required level during the initial compliance window that ended June 29, 2026, Nasdaq determined the company remained eligible for a second 180-day period. To maintain its listing, the firm’s stock must close at or above $1 for at least ten consecutive business days within this new timeframe, and management plans to evaluate available options to achieve this, while trading in IMTE shares continues uninterrupted on Nasdaq.

More about Integrated Media Technology

Integrated Media Technology Limited is an Australia-based company listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker IMTE. The firm operates within the broader technology and media space, with its common stock subject to U.S. exchange listing standards that govern minimum bid price and continued market eligibility.

As a foreign private issuer, Integrated Media Technology reports to U.S. regulators under Form 20-F and related filings. Its shares are currently traded on Nasdaq, and the company’s compliance with listing rules is closely monitored by the Nasdaq Listing Qualifications department, reflecting its reliance on U.S. capital markets.

Average Trading Volume: 67,564

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.58M

data.title: Surf Air Mobility advances Hawaiʻi electric aviation initiative
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Surf Air Mobility, Inc. ( (SRFM) ) has provided an update.

On June 26, 2026, Surf Air Mobility announced an electric aircraft demonstration program in Hawaiʻi with BETA Technologies, using BETA’s ALIA CTOL aircraft over six to eight weeks to gather operational, economic and infrastructure data. Hawaiian Airlines is supporting the trial with route insights and feasibility work, and Surf Air Mobility later corrected its release to clarify that it plans, rather than has already managed, to be the first Part 135 operator to commercialize electric passenger flights for scheduled and on-demand services.

The program leverages Surf Air’s Mokulele Airlines network, existing Hawaiʻi airport infrastructure and SurfOS software to assess how electric aircraft could support future cargo and passenger operations on the state’s interisland routes. On July 1, 2026, Surf Air Mobility also closed an exchange of its existing $46.9 million senior secured convertible note into two new secured notes due 2027 and 2028, reshaping its debt profile as it commits capital and operational focus to scaling commercial electric aviation in Hawaiʻi.

The most recent analyst rating on (SRFM) stock is a Buy
with a $5.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Surf Air Mobility, Inc. stock,
see the SRFM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SRFM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRFM is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial health (large losses, heavy cash burn, and negative equity), which raises funding and dilution risk. Offsetting this, the latest earnings call and recent corporate developments point to improving execution—tightened adjusted EBITDA-loss guidance and tangible SurfOS commercialization progress—while technicals remain mixed with the stock still below longer-term trend averages.

To see Spark’s full report on SRFM stock,
click here.

More about Surf Air Mobility, Inc.

Surf Air Mobility Inc. is a Los Angeles-based air mobility platform focused on modernizing regional air operations through its AI-enabled SurfOS software and the adoption of next-generation aircraft. The company operates Mokulele Airlines, one of the largest U.S. commuter airlines by scheduled departures, and provides private charter services, giving it operational scale and data to support the rollout of electric aviation solutions.

These capabilities position Surf Air Mobility as a player in regional and commuter aviation, with a particular focus on integrating electric aircraft into short-haul networks. Its presence in Hawaiʻi through Mokulele Airlines provides a real-world testbed for electrified regional air transport, reinforcing its strategy to shape a more efficient, connected and accessible future for aviation.

data.title: Alliance Resource expands mineral royalty footprint with acquisition
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Alliance Resource ( (ARLP) ) has shared an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, Alliance Minerals, a wholly owned subsidiary of Alliance Resource Partners, L.P., completed a $206.2 million acquisition of remaining general and limited partner interests in AllDale Minerals III and IV, financed with cash, revolver borrowings and a new $150 million term loan maturing in 2028. The deal, vetted by an independent conflicts committee due to related-party involvement, restructures AllDale’s governance so Alliance holds non-economic general partner stakes plus majority limited partner interests, expanding control to about 115,680 net royalty acres, including sizable Permian Basin exposure, and further strengthens ARLP’s position in oil and gas mineral royalties alongside its core coal operations.

On July 2, 2026, the partnership announced the closing of the acquisition, highlighting that the new term loan carries covenant limits on leverage and secured debt, and is backed by guarantees and collateral across Alliance’s mineral entities. The transactions consolidate royalty ownership, remove legacy profit interests tied to prior general partner stakes, and enhance ARLP’s strategic footprint in oil and gas basins, with implications for future cash flows and diversification for unitholders as the company balances coal and mineral-based income streams.

The most recent analyst rating on (ARLP) stock is a Buy
with a $33.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alliance Resource stock,
see the ARLP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARLP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARLP is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by stable financial fundamentals—healthy margins, low leverage, and strong operating cash flow—tempered by weakening revenue/earnings trends and softer free-cash-flow momentum. Valuation is supportive (moderate P/E and high yield), while technicals are mostly neutral. The earnings call and recent AllDale deal add some visibility and cash-flow positives, but coal price pressure, the Metiki impairment uncertainty, and thin distribution coverage limit upside in the near term.

To see Spark’s full report on ARLP stock,
click here.

More about Alliance Resource

Alliance Resource Partners, L.P. is a diversified natural resource company and currently the second-largest coal producer in the eastern United States, supplying coal to domestic and international utilities, metallurgical and industrial customers. The partnership also earns operating and royalty income from mineral interests in key coal and oil and gas regions across the U.S., and is pursuing investments in energy-related technologies and infrastructure to position itself as a long-term energy partner.

On July 2, 2026, PomDoctor Limited announced a strategic upgrade that repositions the business from a traditional online healthcare platform to a foundational infrastructure provider for predictive healthcare data and services. The move centers on integrating wearable devices, AI analytics, physician services, real-world data and healthcare payment networks into a closed-loop ecosystem aimed at continuous, personalized and proactive care.

By building a multi-dimensional health data platform and diversified revenue model beyond pharmaceutical sales, PomDoctor seeks to strengthen its industry positioning in digital medicine and support global expansion, with the U.S. cited as a key next step.

The company’s “healthcare intelligence flywheel” concept links real-time data capture via wearables to AI-driven risk prediction and physician intervention, reinforced by insurance integration to enable value-based care. As platform usage grows, PomDoctor expects its data assets and AI capabilities to compound, potentially enhancing service quality and attracting more stakeholders across the healthcare ecosystem.

data.title: Kartoon Studios Adopts Stockholder Rights Protection Plan
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Kartoon Studios ( (TOON) ) has provided an update.

On July 1, 2026, Kartoon Studios’ board approved a preferred stock rights agreement and declared a dividend of one right for each outstanding common share, with a record date of July 13, 2026. The plan, announced publicly on July 2, 2026, gives shareholders rights to purchase fractional Series D preferred shares and is structured to impose significant dilution on any investor acquiring 10% or more of the company’s stock without board approval.

The stockholder rights plan, which runs through July 29, 2027 unless redeemed or exchanged earlier, includes flip-in and flip-over mechanisms, redemption and exchange provisions, and detailed exemptions for the company, its subsidiaries, insiders and existing large holders. Kartoon Studios stated the plan was not adopted in response to a specific takeover bid, positioning it as a protective measure to deter opportunistic or coercive accumulation of shares and to support long-term shareholder interests.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (ongoing large losses, cash burn, and declining TTM revenue), only partly offset by improved balance-sheet leverage. Strong technical momentum and a favorable legal settlement provide support, but the negative P/E and lack of dividend signal elevated fundamental risk.

To see Spark’s full report on TOON stock,
click here.

More about Kartoon Studios

Kartoon Studios, listed on NYSE American as TOON, operates in the children’s and family entertainment industry, producing and distributing premium animated content and high-value intellectual property. The company controls Stan Lee Universe, runs Mainframe Studios, one of North America’s largest animation producers, and reaches viewers via Toon Media Networks across linear TV, AVOD, SVOD, FAST channels and major streaming platforms.

With Kartoon Channel!, Ameba, Kartoon Channel Worldwide and Frederator, the group maintains a global footprint in more than 60 territories and claims the top ranking for Kartoon Channel! among kids’ streaming apps on Apple’s App Store. Its multi-platform distribution and robust content pipeline are central to its strategy of sustained growth and enhanced long-term shareholder value.

On July 2, 2026, CNS Pharmaceuticals posted a June 2026 investor presentation outlining a disciplined strategic reset anchored in oncology and neurology assets. Following a comprehensive review, management concluded that its historic focus on glioblastoma was not aligned with long-term growth and is now redirecting resources toward larger markets with strong investor interest and clearer commercial opportunities.

The presentation details rapid execution steps already taken in 2026, including appointment of a new CEO and full executive team, completion of a $22.5 million financing viewed as a top-performing PIPE, and initiation of a formal asset search. CNS plans to acquire underfunded or shelved clinical-stage programs with strong biological rationale, defined FDA pathways and near-term value inflection catalysts, while preparing legacy programs for out-licensing, positioning the company for faster development cycles and potential meaningful clinical or regulatory milestones within a year of acquisition.

Nova ( (NVMI) ) has provided an update.

Nova announced on July 2, 2026 that a leading global foundry has selected its Nova WMC™ platform as tool‑of‑record for multilayer measurement in the most advanced packaging processes. The decision followed a competitive evaluation and is expected to support multiple advanced packaging production flows at the customer.

The company said the win positions it for further deployment as the customer expands capacity and comes alongside accelerating adoption of WMC™ at several memory and foundry customers. Strong demand is being driven by the platform’s modular, customizable architecture, which handles warpage, complex shapes and varying surfaces while delivering high‑throughput, nanometer‑level mapping.

Chief executive Gaby Waisman noted that Nova WMC™ is entering a rapid growth phase, with customer uptake across advanced packaging and high‑bandwidth memory applications reinforcing Nova’s status as a trusted partner. The expanded use of WMC™ strengthens Nova’s foothold in cutting‑edge semiconductor packaging, with implications for its competitive positioning and growth prospects as demand for advanced chip architectures increases.

with a $600.00 price target.

Nova partners with semiconductor manufacturers worldwide from offices in key regions, positioning itself as an integral supplier to foundry and memory producers. data.title: Arcturus Therapeutics Announces Thermo Fisher mRNA Partnership
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Arcturus Therapeutics ( (ARCT) ).

On June 26, 2026, Arcturus Therapeutics entered a strategic collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific and its affiliates to support development of ARCT-032, its investigational mRNA therapy for cystic fibrosis, through contract research and manufacturing services. Under a master services framework, Thermo Fisher will contribute up to $40 million in clinical manufacturing for ARCT-032, while Arcturus will engage Thermo Fisher’s PPD unit for up to $40 million in clinical research services.

Phase 3 manufacturing, clinical trial supply, and related technical services will be provided under a project agreement that covers activities from technical transfer and engineering batches to fill-finish, release and stability studies. Subject to future regulatory approval of ARCT-032, Thermo Fisher would gain exclusive commercial manufacturing rights for a defined period, positioning Arcturus with integrated late-stage and commercial support for its cystic fibrosis program and reinforcing Thermo Fisher’s role as a key partner in complex mRNA drug development.

On July 2, 2026, Arcturus announced the collaboration publicly, highlighting Thermo Fisher’s Accelerator Drug Development model that combines manufacturing, clinical research and commercialization expertise. The deal underscores a trend in biotechnology toward comprehensive outsourcing of advanced mRNA programs, with potential operational and commercial implications for Arcturus as it advances ARCT-032 from Phase 2 toward Phase 3 and possible market entry.

The most recent analyst rating on (ARCT) stock is a Buy
with a $27.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Arcturus Therapeutics stock,
see the ARCT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARCT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARCT is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance—shrinking revenue, large losses, and continued cash burn—despite a relatively low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals are neutral with longer-term trend weakness, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend. The earnings call provides a meaningful partial offset via clinical/regulatory progress and stated cash runway, but operational and study-design risks remain.

To see Spark’s full report on ARCT stock,
click here.

More about Arcturus Therapeutics

Arcturus Therapeutics Holdings Inc., based in San Diego and listed on Nasdaq as ARCT, is a messenger RNA medicines company focused on liver and respiratory rare disease therapeutics. It leverages proprietary LUNAR lipid-mediated delivery, STARR self-amplifying mRNA technology and in-house mRNA manufacturing, and has developed KOSTAIVE, the first approved sa-mRNA COVID vaccine.

The company maintains a broad pipeline, including RNA therapeutic candidates for cystic fibrosis and ornithine transcarbamylase deficiency, alongside partnered mRNA vaccine programs for COVID-19 and influenza. Its global footprint includes collaborations with CSL Seqirus, U.S. BARDA for pandemic flu and a Japanese joint venture, ARCALIS, supported by an extensive portfolio of more than 500 patents and applications worldwide.

On July 1, 2026, KE Holdings approved the grant of 7,025,385 restricted share units to 649 non-executive employees under its 2020 Share Incentive Plan, with no purchase price and various vesting schedules ranging from immediate to up to 48 months. data.title: Wallbox Finalizes Restructuring and Secures €15.8 Million in New Equity
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Wallbox ( (WBX) ) is now available.

On July 2, 2026 Wallbox reported completion of the equity financing tied to its court-approved restructuring plan, raising about €11.8 million from existing shareholders and the Generalitat de Catalunya’s IFEM vehicle, alongside capitalization of bridge-loan discount and PIK interest. The payments by reference shareholders were largely settled via set-off against a bridge loan, which was fully repaid, and participants received five-year warrants linked to the company’s Class A shares.

The company also closed a separate €4 million private placement on July 1, 2026 with new investor FOCUS ON NEXT FRONTIER, which subscribed for additional Class A shares on the same pricing terms and obtained matching long-dated warrants. Court approval of Wallbox’s restructuring became final and non-appealable on June 25, 2026, marking a key milestone that strengthens its balance sheet, improves liquidity and provides a firmer platform for executing its long-term business strategy.

Founded in 2015, Wallbox focuses on advanced hardware and software that integrate EV charging with smart energy management, aiming to redefine the relationship between consumers and the grid. Its products target the accelerating electrification of mobility and support more sustainable energy use worldwide, positioning the company in the fast-growing EV infrastructure market.

data.title: Vaxart Reaches Governance Agreement, Ending Proxy Dispute
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Vaxart ( (VXRT) ) has shared an update.

On July 1, 2026, Vaxart reached a cooperation agreement with a stockholder group that ended a proxy contest ahead of the 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The deal includes the withdrawal of the group’s director nominations and a joint search, within 90 days after the meeting, for a mutually agreed independent director to join the board and key committees.

Under the agreement, Vaxart will adopt director resignation and stock ownership policies, refresh board committee leadership, and establish new Stockholder Engagement and Clinical and Regulatory Affairs Committees. Management also committed to regular quarterly meetings with the stockholder group, while the company will reimburse up to $650,000 of the group’s expenses, marking a notable governance reset intended to strengthen board oversight and investor relations.

Spark’s Take on VXRT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VXRT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance (profitability and free cash flow turning positive with low leverage), but is held back by weak technicals (downtrend with negative MACD). Valuation is supportive due to a very low P/E, while corporate events are moderately positive (incremental trial funding and runway actions) but tempered by prior funding reduction and potential dilution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on VXRT stock,
click here.

More about Vaxart

Vaxart, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing a range of oral recombinant vaccines based on its proprietary pill-based delivery platform. Its vaccines are designed to be stored and shipped without refrigeration and administered without needles, targeting diseases such as coronavirus, norovirus, influenza and HPV, with a focus on broad patent protection for its oral vaccination technologies.

The company aims to create oral versions of currently marketed vaccines and novel recombinant vaccines for new indications, including its first immune-oncology program, a therapeutic HPV vaccine. By emphasizing ease of distribution and administration, Vaxart is positioning itself in the vaccine market as a differentiated player focused on patient-friendly, scalable immunization solutions.
